room.caption: [G2-DeathMtBS] And there you go.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(10)
if global.gameProgress=770 global.gameProgress=780
backA=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backA.type=2 backA.image_xscale=1.875 backA.image_yscale=1.84 backA.backSet=backZeldaMountain backA.xMoveScale=0.6 backA.yMoveScale=1 backA.depth=1499999
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4MainA) //sideChat=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4SideA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(208) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
